mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_preference WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_preference ( student_id, year, choice1_teacher_id, choice2_teacher_id, choice3_teacher_id, file1_path, file2_path, file3_path, status ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{year}, #{choice1TeacherId}, #{choice2TeacherId}, #{choice3TeacherId}, #{file1Path}, #{file2Path}, #{file3Path}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student_preference SET choice1_teacher_id = #{choice1TeacherId}, choice2_teacher_id = #{choice2TeacherId}, choice3_teacher_id = #{choice3TeacherId}, file1_path = #{file1Path}, file2_path = #{file2Path}, file3_path = #{file3Path}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND year = #{year}
